name: empty/no_placeholders
in: SELECT 1
out: SELECT 1

name: automation_tokens.go:25 INSERT VALUES(8 placeholders)
in:
INSERT INTO automation_tokens(id, name, prefix, user_id, role_at_mint, token_hash, permissions, expires_at)
			 VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
out:
INSERT INTO automation_tokens(id, name, prefix, user_id, role_at_mint, token_hash, permissions, expires_at)
			 VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8)

name: automation_tokens.go:40 SELECT WHERE id=?
in:
SELECT id, name, prefix, user_id, role_at_mint, token_hash, permissions,
		        expires_at, last_used, created_at
		   FROM automation_tokens WHERE id=?
out:
SELECT id, name, prefix, user_id, role_at_mint, token_hash, permissions,
		        expires_at, last_used, created_at
		   FROM automation_tokens WHERE id=$1

name: automation_tokens.go:88 DELETE FROM WHERE id=?
in: DELETE FROM automation_tokens WHERE id=?
out: DELETE FROM automation_tokens WHERE id=$1

name: automation_tokens.go:107 UPDATE SET CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=?
in: UPDATE automation_tokens SET last_used=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=?
out: UPDATE automation_tokens SET last_used=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=$1

name: aliases.go:30 INSERT VALUES(5 placeholders)
in: INSERT INTO model_aliases(alias, concrete_model, service_id, provider, priority) VALUES(?,?,?,?,?)
out: INSERT INTO model_aliases(alias, concrete_model, service_id, provider, priority) VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)

name: aliases.go:121 UPDATE SET 2 WHERE 1
in: UPDATE model_aliases SET concrete_model=?, service_id=? WHERE alias=?
out: UPDATE model_aliases SET concrete_model=$1, service_id=$2 WHERE alias=$3

name: aliases.go:143 UPDATE SET 4 WHERE 1
in: UPDATE model_aliases SET concrete_model=?, service_id=?, provider=?, priority=? WHERE alias=?
out: UPDATE model_aliases SET concrete_model=$1, service_id=$2, provider=$3, priority=$4 WHERE alias=$5

name: audit.go:102 WHERE actor compound
in: (actor_id = ? OR actor_email = ?)
out: (actor_id = $1 OR actor_email = $2)

name: audit.go:107 LIKE with three placeholders
in: (lower(action) LIKE ? OR lower(subject_label) LIKE ? OR lower(actor_email) LIKE ?)
out: (lower(action) LIKE $1 OR lower(subject_label) LIKE $2 OR lower(actor_email) LIKE $3)

name: audit.go:221 UPDATE SET payload WHERE id
in: UPDATE audit_events SET payload=? WHERE id=?
out: UPDATE audit_events SET payload=$1 WHERE id=$2

name: budgets.go:97-99 UPDATE multi-column
in:
SET scope=?, subject_id=?, daily_usd=?, action_on_exceed=?, alert_webhook_id=?
		  WHERE id=?
out:
SET scope=$1, subject_id=$2, daily_usd=$3, action_on_exceed=$4, alert_webhook_id=$5
		  WHERE id=$6

name: cache/exact:270 VALUES + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
in:
VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
		ON CONFLICT(key_hash) DO NOTHING
out:
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8)
		ON CONFLICT(key_hash) DO NOTHING

name: cache/exact:365 DELETE OR LIKE pattern
in: DELETE FROM cache_entries WHERE scope_key = ? OR scope_key LIKE ?
out: DELETE FROM cache_entries WHERE scope_key = $1 OR scope_key LIKE $2

name: cache/semantic chromem.go:222-223 INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE
in:
VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
		ON CONFLICT(service_id, exact_key_hash) DO UPDATE SET
out:
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
		ON CONFLICT(service_id, exact_key_hash) DO UPDATE SET

name: cache/semantic chromem.go:425 dynamic IN placeholders
in: DELETE FROM semantic_index WHERE service_id = ? AND exact_key_hash IN (?,?,?,?)
out: DELETE FROM semantic_index WHERE service_id = $1 AND exact_key_hash IN ($2,$3,$4,$5)

name: connlog/sink.go:230 cursor subquery
in: started_at < (SELECT started_at FROM connection_logs WHERE id = ?)
out: started_at < (SELECT started_at FROM connection_logs WHERE id = $1)

name: connlog/sink.go:358 substr LIKE clause
in: WHERE substr(started_at,1,10) = ?
out: WHERE substr(started_at,1,10) = $1

name: connlog/sink.go:401-402 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET
in:
VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(day, service_id, kind) DO UPDATE SET
out:
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
			 ON CONFLICT(day, service_id, kind) DO UPDATE SET

name: db/ai_config.go:58-60 INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE
in:
INSERT INTO service_ai_config(service_id, config, updated_at)
		 VALUES(?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
		 ON CONFLICT(service_id) DO UPDATE SET
out:
INSERT INTO service_ai_config(service_id, config, updated_at)
		 VALUES($1, $2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
		 ON CONFLICT(service_id) DO UPDATE SET

name: db/custom_domains.go:46-50 multi-line UPDATE SET 7 WHERE 2
in:
UPDATE service_custom_domains
		    SET hostname=?, cert_pem=?, key_pem=?, cert_sha256=?,
		        not_before=?, not_after=?, updated_at=?
		  WHERE id=? AND service_id=?
out:
UPDATE service_custom_domains
		    SET hostname=$1, cert_pem=$2, key_pem=$3, cert_sha256=$4,
		        not_before=$5, not_after=$6, updated_at=$7
		  WHERE id=$8 AND service_id=$9

name: db/custom_domains.go:154 not_after < ?
in: FROM service_custom_domains WHERE not_after < ?
out: FROM service_custom_domains WHERE not_after < $1

name: db/services.go:25-26 INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
in:
VALUES(?,?,?,?)
		 ON CONFLICT(user_id, name) DO NOTHING
out:
VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4)
		 ON CONFLICT(user_id, name) DO NOTHING

name: db/sessions.go:91 WHERE != placeholder
in: DELETE FROM sessions WHERE user_id=? AND id<>?
out: DELETE FROM sessions WHERE user_id=$1 AND id<>$2

name: db/settings.go:41-42 INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET excluded
in:
INSERT INTO settings(key, value, updated_at) VALUES(?,?,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
			 ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value=excluded.value, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
out:
INSERT INTO settings(key, value, updated_at) VALUES($1,$2,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
			 ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value=excluded.value, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

name: db/tunnels.go:120-123 UPDATE compound expressions
in:
UPDATE tunnels
		    SET total_bytes_in  = total_bytes_in  + ?,
		        total_bytes_out = total_bytes_out + ?
		  WHERE id=?
out:
UPDATE tunnels
		    SET total_bytes_in  = total_bytes_in  + $1,
		        total_bytes_out = total_bytes_out + $2
		  WHERE id=$3

name: db/users.go:65-67 multi-line LIKE escape + LIMIT/OFFSET
in:
SELECT id, email FROM users
		  WHERE email LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
		  ORDER BY email
		  LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
out:
SELECT id, email FROM users
		  WHERE email LIKE $1 ESCAPE '\'
		  ORDER BY email
		  LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

name: store/store.go:183 INSERT ON CONFLICT(email) DO NOTHING
in:
INSERT INTO users(id, email, password_hash, role, status)
		 VALUES(?,?,?,?,?)
		 ON CONFLICT(email) DO NOTHING
out:
INSERT INTO users(id, email, password_hash, role, status)
		 VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)
		 ON CONFLICT(email) DO NOTHING

name: edge: question mark inside single-quoted string literal
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE name = '?' AND code = ?
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE name = '?' AND code = $1

name: edge: question mark inside double-quoted identifier
in: SELECT "col?" FROM t WHERE id = ?
out: SELECT "col?" FROM t WHERE id = $1

name: edge: single-quoted string with escaped apostrophe '' then placeholder
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE label = 'O''Brien?' AND id = ?
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE label = 'O''Brien?' AND id = $1

name: edge: question mark in -- line comment
in:
SELECT id FROM t -- bound ?
 WHERE id = ?
out:
SELECT id FROM t -- bound ?
 WHERE id = $1

name: edge: -- comment to EOF preserves trailing question
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE x = ? -- ? mark
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE x = $1 -- ? mark

name: edge: /* block comment */ with placeholder inside
in: SELECT /* ? hint */ id FROM t WHERE id = ?
out: SELECT /* ? hint */ id FROM t WHERE id = $1

name: edge: multi-line block comment with ? inside
in:
SELECT id FROM t
/* note: contains ?
   another line ? */
WHERE id = ?
out:
SELECT id FROM t
/* note: contains ?
   another line ? */
WHERE id = $1

name: edge: dollar-quoted string contains ?
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE body = $$has ? inside$$ AND id = ?
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE body = $$has ? inside$$ AND id = $1

name: edge: tagged dollar-quote $tag$...$tag$ with ?
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE body = $tag$has ? inside$tag$ AND id = ?
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE body = $tag$has ? inside$tag$ AND id = $1

name: edge: 10 placeholders to verify $10 not split as $1 then 0
edge: IN clause with placeholders
in: SELECT id FROM t WHERE id IN (?,?,?)
out: SELECT id FROM t WHERE id IN ($1,$2,$3)

name: edge: literal $5 in single-quoted string preserved (no shift)
in: SELECT '$5' AS price, id FROM t WHERE id = ?
out: SELECT '$5' AS price, id FROM t WHERE id = $1

name: edge: comparison operators >= <=
in: WHERE ts >= ? AND ts <= ?
out: WHERE ts >= $1 AND ts <= $2

name: edge: subquery with placeholder
in: SELECT s.id FROM sessions s WHERE s.user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?)
out: SELECT s.id FROM sessions s WHERE s.user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = $1)

name: edge: COALESCE with placeholder
in: UPDATE t SET v = COALESCE(?, v) WHERE id = ?
out: UPDATE t SET v = COALESCE($1, v) WHERE id = $2

name: edge: parameter at very start of string
in: ? AS literal
out: $1 AS literal

name: edge: parameter at very end of string
in: WHERE id=?
out: WHERE id=$1

name: edge: consecutive placeholders no spaces
in: VALUES(?,?,?)

name: edge: 15 placeholders verifying multi-digit indices
in: INSERT INTO t(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,o) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)

name: edge: single line -- comment without trailing newline ending with ?
in: -- placeholder ? here
out: -- placeholder ? here

name: edge: only a block comment, no placeholders
in: /* nothing here ? */
out: /* nothing here ? */

name: edge: only single-quoted literal containing ?
in: 'is this ?'
out: 'is this ?'
